working_on.task: Fixed W2 and W3 (ModelQuota Caching & Legacy Code Cleanup)

pending_tasks.task: W1: Remove non-existent models from GeminiApiClient lists
W4: Remove redundant setVolume call in TtsManager.speak
Optimize Prompt AI for Gemini 2.5 Flash thinking capability

recent_changes.description: Fixed W2 (Cached SHA-256 for ModelQuotaManager) and W3 (Removed legacy Retrofit/Backend code, cleaned up NetworkModule and build specs).

Fixed Performance Issues C1, C2, C3: Applied Singleton pattern to avoid re-creation of Repository and Managers; parallelized metadata and transcript fetching in MainActivity to save 500ms+; moved Chaquopy calls to Dispatchers.IO to prevent ANR.
Executed Performance Audit. Found 3 critical issues (blocking I/O, synchronous remote fetching, non-singleton manager creations) that severely impacts Android UX.

errors_encountered.error: Chaquopy block main thread causing ANR
errors_encountered.solution: Wrap pythonManager object calls inside Flow using .flowOn(Dispatchers.IO)

errors_encountered.error: Memory and Resource Overhead from repeated Object creations
errors_encountered.solution: Apply double-checked locking Singleton pattern to ModelQuotaManager and SummarizationRepository

decisions_made.reason: Wait for metadata via async before fetching summary to update UI instantly and guarantee history data consistency.
Standalone logic via local IP is now fully verified and bypasses YouTube blocks.
Superior thinking/reasoning capability for video summarization.
Gemini API uses OkHttp directly, Retrofit and its converters were bloating the APK unused.
